name: vj
label: VJ (Live Visuals)
description: GANTASMO-LIVE-VJ audio-reactive visualizer as an SA3 sidecar. Spawns the Vite dev server on demand (default port 5187) and exposes it through SA3's UI as a center tab / detachable floating window. VJ project lives at D:/StableAudio/GANTASMO-LIVE-VJ (override via STABLEDAW_VJ_PROJECT). Disable to skip the auto-spawn on backend startup.
